segments.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah, like the Looney Tunes sound effect, like...
Oh, the footstool into a jab, look, beautiful stuff!
Make it like an arch, finding it like a litter, that was the jab.

full_text: Yeah, yeah, yeah, like the Looney Tunes sound effect, like... Oh, the footstool into a jab, look, beautiful stuff! Make it like an arch, finding it like a litter, that was the jab.
